name: Fast & the Furriest 5K
notes: First race since Monumental after limited training in December and January from a tweaked ankle. 1st place overall in snowy and very windy conditions on a course of nothing but rolling hills. I led most of the race with another runner. We were both caught in the trap of pushing the pace or drafting. We matched each other move for move until I was able to make some space in the last mile.

name: CNO Financial Indianapolis Monumental Marathon
notes: First marathon. Big shout out to Kevin McLendon for partnering with me the first 16 miles. Also big thanks to Larry Lovato, who I never spoke with, but carried me through the last 8 miles.

name: Iron Horse Half Marathon
notes: Hilly and beautiful course. I spent most of the race running alone.

name: Geist Half Marathon
notes: First time racing a half marathon since 2011. Satisfied with my results and recent progress.

name: Small Town America 5K
notes: Killer hill at the end. It was nice to test my legs on the Kentucky terrain.

name: Butler Bulldog Jog
notes: Side stitch came on around 4.5 miles. Rough finish to the race.
